goal: is_galois_connection[A, B](lower, upper) = forall(x0: A, x1: B) { lower(x0) <= x1 = x0 <= upper(x1) }
proof: function[T0: PartialOrder, T1: PartialOrder](x0: T1 -> T0, x1: T0 -> T1) { forall(x2: T0, x3: T1) { x2 <= x0(x3) = x1(x2) <= x3 } = is_galois_connection[T0, T1](x1, x0) }[A, B](upper, lower)
(forall(x0: A, x1: B) { x0 <= upper(x1) = lower(x0) <= x1 } = true)

function(x0: A, x1: B) { lower(x0) <= x1 = x0 <= upper(x1) }(a, b)
function[T0: PartialOrder, T1: PartialOrder](x0: T0 -> T1) { forall(x1: T0, x2: T0) { not x1 <= x2 or x0(x1) <= x0(x2) } = is_monotone[T0, T1](x0) }[A, B](lower)

function[T0: PartialOrder](x0: T0 -> T0) { forall(x1: T0) { x1 <= x0(x1) } = is_extensive[T0](x0) }[A](close)
is_extensive[A](close)
(forall(x0: A) { x0 <= close(x0) } = true)
function(x0: A) { x0 <= close(x0) }(a)
function[T0](x0: T0 -> T0) { forall(x1: T0) { x0(x0(x1)) = x0(x1) } = is_idempotent_map[T0](x0) }[A](close)
is_idempotent_map[A](close)
(forall(x0: A) { close(close(x0)) = close(x0) } = true)
function(x0: A) { close(close(x0)) = close(x0) }(a)

goal: is_kernel_operator[A](kernel) = (is_monotone[A, A](kernel) and is_reductive[A](kernel) and is_idempotent_map[A](kernel))
proof: function[T0: PartialOrder](x0: T0 -> T0) { (is_monotone[T0, T0](x0) and is_reductive[T0](x0) and is_idempotent_map[T0](x0)) = is_kernel_operator[T0](x0) }[A](kernel)

goal: is_kernel_operator[A](kernel) = (is_monotone[A, A](kernel) and is_reductive[A](kernel) and is_idempotent_map[A](kernel))
proof: function[T0: PartialOrder](x0: T0 -> T0) { (is_monotone[T0, T0](x0) and is_reductive[T0](x0) and is_idempotent_map[T0](x0)) = is_kernel_operator[T0](x0) }[A](kernel)

goal: is_kernel_operator[A](kernel) = (is_monotone[A, A](kernel) and is_reductive[A](kernel) and is_idempotent_map[A](kernel))
proof: function[T0: PartialOrder](x0: T0 -> T0) { (is_monotone[T0, T0](x0) and is_reductive[T0](x0) and is_idempotent_map[T0](x0)) = is_kernel_operator[T0](x0) }[A](kernel)
function[T0: PartialOrder](x0: T0 -> T0) { forall(x1: T0) { x0(x1) <= x1 } = is_reductive[T0](x0) }[A](kernel)
is_reductive[A](kernel)
(forall(x0: A) { kernel(x0) <= x0 } = true)
function(x0: A) { kernel(x0) <= x0 }(a)
function[T0](x0: T0 -> T0) { forall(x1: T0) { x0(x0(x1)) = x0(x1) } = is_idempotent_map[T0](x0) }[A](kernel)
is_idempotent_map[A](kernel)
(forall(x0: A) { kernel(kernel(x0)) = kernel(x0) } = true)
function(x0: A) { kernel(kernel(x0)) = kernel(x0) }(a)
function[T0: PartialOrder](x0: T0 -> T0) { forall(x1: T0) { x1 <= x0(x1) } = is_extensive[T0](x0) }[A](galois_closure[A, B](lower, upper))
let w0: A satisfy { not w0 <= galois_closure[A, B](lower, upper, w0) }
function(x0: A) { x0 <= galois_closure[A, B](lower, upper, x0) }(w0)

goal: galois_closure[A, B](lower, upper, galois_closure[A, B](lower, upper, a)) = galois_closure[A, B](lower, upper, a)

proof: function[T0](x0: T0 -> T0) { forall(x1: T0) { x0(x0(x1)) = x0(x1) } = is_idempotent_map[T0](x0) }[A](galois_closure[A, B](lower, upper))
let w0: A satisfy { galois_closure[A, B](lower, upper, galois_closure[A, B](lower, upper, w0)) != galois_closure[A, B](lower, upper, w0) }
function(x0: A) { galois_closure[A, B](lower, upper, galois_closure[A, B](lower, upper, x0)) = galois_closure[A, B](lower, upper, x0) }(w0)

goal: is_closure_operator[A](galois_closure[A, B](lower, upper)) = (is_monotone[A, A](galois_closure[A, B](lower, upper)) and is_extensive[A](galois_closure[A, B](lower, upper)) and is_idempotent_map[A](galois_closure[A, B](lower, upper)))
proof: function[T0: PartialOrder](x0: T0 -> T0) { (is_monotone[T0, T0](x0) and is_extensive[T0](x0) and is_idempotent_map[T0](x0)) = is_closure_operator[T0](x0) }[A](galois_closure[A, B](lower, upper))

goal: is_monotone[A, A](galois_closure[A, B](lower, upper)) and is_extensive[A](galois_closure[A, B](lower, upper)) and is_idempotent_map[A](galois_closure[A, B](lower, upper))

proof: function[T0: PartialOrder](x0: T0 -> T0) { forall(x1: T0) { x0(x1) <= x1 } = is_reductive[T0](x0) }[B](galois_kernel[A, B](lower, upper))
let w0: B satisfy { not galois_kernel[A, B](lower, upper, w0) <= w0 }
function(x0: B) { galois_kernel[A, B](lower, upper, x0) <= x0 }(w0)

goal: galois_kernel[A, B](lower, upper, galois_kernel[A, B](lower, upper, b)) = galois_kernel[A, B](lower, upper, b)

proof: function[T0](x0: T0 -> T0) { forall(x1: T0) { x0(x0(x1)) = x0(x1) } = is_idempotent_map[T0](x0) }[B](galois_kernel[A, B](lower, upper))
let w0: B satisfy { galois_kernel[A, B](lower, upper, galois_kernel[A, B](lower, upper, w0)) != galois_kernel[A, B](lower, upper, w0) }
function(x0: B) { galois_kernel[A, B](lower, upper, galois_kernel[A, B](lower, upper, x0)) = galois_kernel[A, B](lower, upper, x0) }(w0)

goal: is_kernel_operator[B](galois_kernel[A, B](lower, upper)) = (is_monotone[B, B](galois_kernel[A, B](lower, upper)) and is_reductive[B](galois_kernel[A, B](lower, upper)) and is_idempotent_map[B](galois_kernel[A, B](lower, upper)))
proof: function[T0: PartialOrder](x0: T0 -> T0) { (is_monotone[T0, T0](x0) and is_reductive[T0](x0) and is_idempotent_map[T0](x0)) = is_kernel_operator[T0](x0) }[B](galois_kernel[A, B](lower, upper))

goal: is_monotone[B, B](galois_kernel[A, B](lower, upper)) and is_reductive[B](galois_kernel[A, B](lower, upper)) and is_idempotent_map[B](galois_kernel[A, B](lower, upper))

proof: function[T0: PartialOrder, T1: PartialOrder](x0: T0 -> T1) { forall(x1: T0, x2: T0) { x1 <= x2 = x0(x1) <= x0(x2) } = is_order_embedding[T0, T1](x0) }[B, A](upper)
let w0: B satisfy { exists(k0: B) { w0 <= k0 != upper(w0) <= upper(k0) } }
let w1: B satisfy { w0 <= w1 != upper(w0) <= upper(w1) }
let w2: B satisfy { w0 <= w2 != upper(w0) <= upper(w2) }
function(x0: B, x1: B) { upper(x0) <= upper(x1) = x0 <= x1 }(w0, w2)

goal: exists(k0: A) { k0 = upper(b) and lower(k0) = b }
proof: function[T0: PartialOrder, T1: PartialOrder](x0: T0 -> T1, x1: T1 -> T0, x2: T1) { not is_galois_insertion[T0, T1](x0, x1) or x2 = x0(x1(x2)) }[A, B](lower, upper, b)
function[T0, T1](x0: T1 -> T0) { forall(x1: T0) { exists(k0: T1) { x0(k0) = x1 } } = is_surjective_fn[T1, T0](x0) }[B, A](lower)
let w0: B satisfy { forall(x0: A) { lower(x0) != w0 } }
function(x0: B) { exists(k0: A) { upper(x0) = k0 and lower(k0) = x0 } }(w0)
let w1: A satisfy { upper(w0) = w1 and lower(w1) = w0 }
let w2(arg0: B) -> w2_result: A satisfy { upper(arg0) = w2_result and lower(w2_result) = arg0 }
function(x0: B) { upper(x0) = w2(x0) and lower(w2(x0)) = x0 }(w0)
function(x0: B) { lower(w2(x0)) = x0 }(w0)
(forall(x1: A) { lower(x1) != w0 } = true)
function(x0: A) { w0 != lower(x0) }(w2(w0))
function[T0: PartialOrder, T1: PartialOrder](x0: T0 -> T1) { (is_monotone[T0, T1](x0) and is_surjective_fn[T0, T1](x0)) = is_order_surjection[T0, T1](x0) }[A, B](lower)
function[T0: PartialOrder, T1: PartialOrder](x0: T0 -> T1) { forall(x1: T0, x2: T0) { x1 <= x2 = x0(x1) <= x0(x2) } = is_order_embedding[T0, T1](x0) }[A, B](lower)
let w0: A satisfy { exists(k0: A) { w0 <= k0 != lower(w0) <= lower(k0) } }
let w1: A satisfy { w0 <= w1 != lower(w0) <= lower(w1) }
let w2: A satisfy { w0 <= w2 != lower(w0) <= lower(w2) }
function(x0: A, x1: A) { lower(x0) <= lower(x1) = x0 <= x1 }(w0, w2)

goal: exists(k0: B) { k0 = lower(a) and upper(k0) = a }
proof: function[T0: PartialOrder, T1: PartialOrder](x0: T0 -> T1, x1: T1 -> T0, x2: T0) { not is_galois_coinsertion[T0, T1](x0, x1) or x2 = x1(x0(x2)) }[A, B](lower, upper, a)
function[T0, T1](x0: T1 -> T0) { forall(x1: T0) { exists(k0: T1) { x0(k0) = x1 } } = is_surjective_fn[T1, T0](x0) }[A, B](upper)
let w0: A satisfy { forall(x0: B) { upper(x0) != w0 } }
function(x0: A) { exists(k0: B) { lower(x0) = k0 and upper(k0) = x0 } }(w0)
let w1: B satisfy { lower(w0) = w1 and upper(w1) = w0 }
let w2(arg0: A) -> w2_result: B satisfy { lower(arg0) = w2_result and upper(w2_result) = arg0 }
function(x0: A) { lower(x0) = w2(x0) and upper(w2(x0)) = x0 }(w0)
function(x0: A) { upper(w2(x0)) = x0 }(w0)
(forall(x1: B) { upper(x1) != w0 } = true)
function(x0: B) { w0 != upper(x0) }(w2(w0))
function[T0: PartialOrder, T1: PartialOrder](x0: T0 -> T1) { (is_monotone[T0, T1](x0) and is_surjective_fn[T0, T1](x0)) = is_order_surjection[T0, T1](x0) }[B, A](upper)
function[T0](x0: T0 -> T0, x1: T0) { is_fixed_by[T0](x0, x1) = (x0(x1) = x1) }[A](galois_closure[A, B](lower, upper), a)
function[T0](x0: T0 -> T0, x1: T0) { is_fixed_by[T0](x0, x1) = (x0(x1) = x1) }[B](galois_kernel[A, B](lower, upper), b)

goal: galois_closure[A, B](lower, upper, a) <= galois_closure[A, B](lower, upper, c)
is_fixed_by(galois_closure[A, B](lower, upper), c) = (galois_closure[A, B](lower, upper, c) = c)
proof: function[T0](x0: T0 -> T0, x1: T0) { is_fixed_by[T0](x0, x1) = (x0(x1) = x1) }[A](galois_closure[A, B](lower, upper), c)

goal: galois_closure[A, B](lower, upper, a) <= c = a <= c
galois_kernel[A, B](lower, upper, k) <= galois_kernel[A, B](lower, upper, b)
is_fixed_by(galois_kernel[A, B](lower, upper), k) = (galois_kernel[A, B](lower, upper, k) = k)
proof: function[T0](x0: T0 -> T0, x1: T0) { is_fixed_by[T0](x0, x1) = (x0(x1) = x1) }[B](galois_kernel[A, B](lower, upper), k)

goal: k <= galois_kernel[A, B](lower, upper, b) = k <= b
